text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating right. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, provides essential nutrients for your body. Combined with regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, this strengthens your heart and muscles. However, sleep is equally important – aiming for seven to nine hours each night helps your body recover and your mind stay sharp. Don't forget mental health, either; managing stress through hobbies or relaxation techniques makes a big difference. Finally, a good work-life balance allows you to dedicate time to both your responsibilities and personal joy, leading to a happier, healthier you.
